name: Hajime Aono
description: Aono Hajime was a prodigy violinist until he grew jaded with playing the violin due to personal reasons. Now in his third year of middle school, he struggles to decide his academic path. One day in school, he meets Akine Ritsuko, a hotheaded novice violinist who wants to enroll in a high school with a distinguished orchestra club. When he finds himself getting closer to Ritsuko and being brought back to the world of violinists, time starts moving again for him. This is the beginning of a youthfu

name: Hana Ichinose
description: The main protagonist of the series, who just recently moved and now attends the Hoshio Private Academy in her first year of high school. Because she caught mumps and thus had to miss out on her high school entry exams, she was forced to repeat her entire final middle school year. As a result, she is very self-conscious about her current standing and that she does not have anyone of her old school friends in her company, and is therefore very glad to build up an immediate friendship with Eiko, Ka

name: Ichijou
description: The class representative of 1-C, Ichijou is easily the most surreal character in the surreal world of Pani Poni. She is inexplicably capable of breaking all physical laws in order to make a joke. Her power is used equally for good and for fun: sometimes she'll be the savior of the class, while at other times she only manages to exacerbate the situation. name: Issei Matsukawa
description: Issei is a 3rd year student from Aobajohsai High; he is one of the middle blockers.

name: Ittousai Itou
description: Founder of the Itto-ryu school of sword fighting. Before establishing his own style, Ittousai is said to have studied a variant of the Chujo-ryu style of sword fighting under Kinemaki Jisai's instruction. He was a mentor of Sasaki Kojiro for a short time after Kojiro left the care of Jisai.

name: Jou Kido
description: Jou Kido is a character in the anime and manga series Digimon Adventure, Digimon Adventure 02 and Digimon Adventure tri.. He is a DigiDestined, partnered to Gomamon, and bearer of the Crest of Sincerity. At a glance, Joe appears to be a a flighty boy and a nervous wreck, panicking over little things. This stems from Joe's strong sense of responsibility, in addition to being the oldest of the group. He acts as the voice of reason and tries, often without success, to steer the other DigiDestined a

name: Jouji Habu
description: A mountaineer with a natural talent for rock wall climbing who has conquered many difficult spots in Japan, including Mount Tanigawa's Ichinokurasawa demon slab. However, because of his lack of recognition he was unable to travel abroad due of financial difficulties. He is uncooperative and very passionate and stubborn about mountain climbing, so his climbing partners wouldn't last long with him. name: Jude
description: He is a researcher at the same institute for medicinal plants as Johan Valdec and is responsible for teaching Sei Takanashi.

name: Jun Toda
description: **Hometown:** Toyama Prefecture, Japan **Motto:** Life is an amusement park. It's a waste if you don't enjoy it once you're inside. **Years Active:** 2017-2021 An overwhelmingly bright girl. Oftentimes she goes too far and people feel she is an idiot. She has her childish sides, but she's always true to her heart and tries her best in everything she does. Loves fried food and sweets. (Source: Official Website)

name: Juugo
description: Juugo is the largest of the three members that comprise Sasuke Uchiha's new team, Snake (which is now Hawk). Juugo was being held at Orochimaru's North Base, which is also where most of Orochimaru's secret research was conducted. Suigetsu can't stand Juugo and comments that one of the reasons he had to retrieve Zabuza Momochi's sword was because of him. name: Lessar
description: She is a member of New Light and was introduced in Volume 17. Lessar is a member of New Light with black hair and a dragon-like tail accessory which allows her to keep her balance when jumping because she can jump very high, but is also afraid of heights, as shown when she had no problems jumping to the top of a building but then hesitated to jump back down. name: Little My
description: She is a small, determined and fiercely independent Mymble. When she wants something done, she does it straight away. She is very aggressive and totally disrespectful, but can be a good friend. She has a brash personality. She is Snufkin's half-sister and later Moomin's adopted sister. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Lolopechka
description: Queen of the Heart Kingdom and user of the Water Spirit Undine.

name: Lyserg Diethel
description: __Race:__ Human / Shaman A British Shaman and a traditional "dowser", whose parents were killed by [Hao](https://anilist.co/character/172/Hao-Asakura). Lyserg has dramatic interactions with all of the main characters at some point, and though he travels with them for a long time, he fights against [Yoh's](https://anilist.co/character/167/Yoh-Asakura) team more than once during the series.
